no-wikipedia:Belle Époque Monte-Carlo.notes: Belle Époque Monte-Carlo is an architectural ensemble (casino, opera, Hotel de Paris, Cafe de Paris) with no single standalone English Wikipedia article; the closest match is the broader 'Architecture of Monaco' article, and the individual component buildings are covered in separate articles, so no qualifying standalone article exists for this stop.
